src/main/java/de/muenchen/rbs/kitafinder.general_idea: Replace javax.validation imports with jakarta.validation to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3 on Java 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Configure Maven compiler source and target to Java 21.
